messages.content: Mission target: 192.168.56.101. Begin the engagement now. Spawn the appropriate first agent.

{"thought": "SITUATION: Mission started against target 192.168.56.101. No prior scan data exists. Environment is unknown. Mission objective: find flag.txt. Exploitation is authorized. HYPOTHESIS: Without port scan data, I cannot make any informed exploitation decisions. My methodology is clear: 'know everything before you exploit anything.' Incomplete enumeration leads to missed attack vectors and failed exploits. OPTIONS: A) Spawn scanner agent immediately — baseline reconnaissance, discover all open ports and service versions. B) Spawn exploit agent without scan data — violates core methodology, will waste time on wrong vectors. C) OSINT (not applicable — target IP already known). DECISION: Option A. Spawn scanner agent to perform comprehensive TCP/UDP port scanning and service fingerprinting. This is ALWAYS the correct first action on a greenfield target. Once scan results return, I will analyze ALL services and spawn exploit agents in parallel for all viable vectors.", "action": "spawn_agent", "parameters": {"agent_type": "scanner", "target": "192.168.56.101", "task_type": "port_scan_full", "options": {"description": "Full port scan of target - TCP and UDP", "scan_type": "full", "top_ports": "both"}}}
